name: sux
description: Marketplace for sux: ONE OAuth-gated plugin — one universal connector (https://sux.colinxs.workers.dev/mcp) whose front-door verbs cover web/data/compute — search, scrape/render, papers, shopping, transforms, pipe/batch — plus `recall` and the `fn` escape hatch, bundled with both the `sux` routing skill and the `life` memory skill. Your personal namespaces live behind separate /<domain>/mcp connectors on the same Worker (vault_/mail_/files_/cal_/contact_ verbs) — live and OAuth-authorized, but hidden from the default discovery manifest (opt in with `?all=1`).

plugins.name: sux
plugins.description: The one sux connector (https://sux.colinxs.workers.dev/mcp) + both skills: the `sux` routing skill AND the `life` memory skill. A single OAuth-gated front door — web search, scraping/rendering, papers, shopping, documents, transforms, pipe/batch composition, plus `recall` and the `fn` escape hatch; the `life` skill turns it into a second brain (capture, remember durable facts/people/decisions, recall with citations, triage the inbox, consolidate into a linked graph). Personal vault/mail/files live behind their own /<domain>/mcp connectors (`vault_`/`mail_`/`files_`/`cal_`/`contact_` verbs) — reachable and OAuth-authorized, but not advertised in the default manifest. One install, one connector, everything behind it. OAuth in-browser on first connect.
